en: Now, the fuel band, our motivation for the movie, keeps track of how you make it count.
But back when the movie was made, it hadn't been released yet.
I wasn't actually wearing a fuel band.
So, I thought I'd revisit the idea.
So what this thing does is, it provides you with a number.
A number that keeps track of how active you are.
Active can mean a lot of things.
Give me a budget, ask me to be active, and I'm on the next flight out.
Air travel is the closest thing to time travel.
We had an idea of what we were doing, but the idea was vague.
